item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested page-level warranty field, frames the repeated stamp/tax/date-to-next-field pattern as a systemic upstream completeness/source-of-truth failure, and redirects to a cross-functional definition of required inquiry information and validation ownership before any UI carrying decision. It provides no requested field, placement, checklist, command sequence, or implementation step."}
